Contact us

Let us help you secure your next investment.

Contact us

Who We Are

Knightsbridge Group is a fully licensed and regulated corporate services provider, law firm, immigration advisory, and real estate brokerage, with offices in Dubai, London, and Istanbul. 

Our principal administration hub is in Dubai, where our integrated team of over 30 legal experts brings together more than 200 years of collective experience in law, corporate structuring, immigration, and real estate. This multi-disciplinary model allows us to deliver seamless, end-to-end solutions for individuals, families, and businesses with complex cross-border needs.

One of our core areas of expertise lies in global immigration services. We help clients secure tax-efficient second residences or citizenships through carefully structured, government-approved golden visa investment programs. 

Alongside this, our corporate and legal services support international business set up and expansion, compliance, and asset protection, while our real estate division provides exclusive access to high-value property investments in Dubai and beyond. 

Having advised some of the largest families and institutions in the Middle East, Knightsbridge Group is committed to providing comprehensive, tailored strategies – ensuring our clients not only meet regulatory requirements but also achieve their long-term wealth, mobility, and legacy objectives.

About Us

Welcome to Knightsbridge Group

Welcome to Knightsbridge Group, your trusted partner in legal support, corporate services, immigration services and wealth management.

Knightsbridge Group is a multi-faceted award winning firm that excels in legal, fiduciary, immigration and accounting services, offering comprehensive support for wealth structuring, protection, legacy planning, and succession.

Established in Dubai in 2010 as a legal consultancy, Knightsbridge Group has expanded its reach globally with offices in key jurisdictions including London, Istanbul, Milan, and the United Arab Emirates.

Our firm is renowned for its ability to navigate complex legal landscapes and resolve conflicts across multiple jurisdictions.

We achieve this through close collaboration with a network of professional advisors, banks, trustees, and other institutions. Notably, Knightsbridge Group maintains an independent stance, avoiding affiliations with other legal or financial service providers.

Knightsbridge Group prides itself on a discreet, friendly, and culturally sensitive approach. Our ethos centers on building responsive and enduring relationships with clients, involving regular consultations with families and their advisors. We emphasize understanding each client’s background, philosophy, and culture to provide advice that aligns with their long-term interests and aspirations.

750+

Families Approved

20+

Years of Experience

30+

Dedicated Team

15+

Programs Offered

Meet

Our Team

Mark Cameron

CEO

Mark is an international corporate and commercial lawyer with over 20 years’ experience advising clients on complex cross-border transactions, corporate governance, and high-stakes strategic matters across the Middle East, Africa, Europe, the UK, Asia, and Latin America.

His practice spans corporate law, commercial law, real estate, commercial litigation, white collar defence, iGaming law, and entertainment law,  with deep expertise in emerging and frontier markets. Mark is a trusted adviser to multinational corporations, sovereign entities, and government-related counterparties navigating sophisticated commercial, regulatory, and political environments. He has developed a recognised niche in representing clients in jurisdictions where confidentiality and in-person representation are operationally critical, regularly deploying to challenging and remote locations worldwide.

Before entering private practice as an international lawyer, Mark held senior in-house legal leadership roles with publicly listed companies and Fortune 500 corporations, advising boards and executive management on M&A transactions, corporate restructurings, regulatory compliance, and governance matters.

Mark began his legal career at a Magic Circle law firm in London, where he advised on large-scale real estate finance transactions, building the transactional foundation that underpins his international practice today.

He is qualified as both a Barrister and Solicitor and holds an LLB.

Outside of practice, Mark is an avid tennis player, golfer, padel enthusiast, cyclist, and Gaelic football player.



Jem Felicilda

Managing Director

With over six years of experience in the immigration industry, Jem ensures Knightsbridge clients have access to the best available citizenship- and residency-by-investment programs and wealth management products. In addition to her extensive expertise in finance, international government requirements and business migration, Jem holds a Bachelor of Arts in Mass Communication from the University of San Jose-Recoletos, Philippines.



Anastasiya Nalla

Senior Client Advisor

With an extensive knowledge of immigration requirements and legal frameworks, Anastasiya helps clients secure second citizenship in various Caribbean and European nations. She has a Master’s in Regional Studies of Middle East and North Africa from Oriental University, Moscow, and is passionate about cross-cultural communication. Anastasiya’s strategic guidance and expert understanding are vital to helping people unlock greater global mobility and international opportunities.



Paulina Schulte

Senior Client Advisor

With international experience gained from living in Poland, Spain, and the UAE, Paulina brings a global outlook and a personal touch to every client interaction. She helps entrepreneurs, investors, and families navigate complex legal frameworks, structure their businesses effectively, and secure long-term solutions for their future – whether through strategic planning or global mobility options.



Umar Makhdoomi

Creative Director

Umar Makhdoomi leads the creative vision at Knightsbridge Group, overseeing brand development, visual identity, content strategy, and customer engagement initiatives while driving innovation and operational excellence across the firm’s international platforms. Working at the intersection of technology, marketing, customer relationship management (CRM), and business automation, he develops integrated solutions that enhance brand performance, streamline processes, and strengthen client engagement.

By bridging marketing innovation, technology solutions, and customer engagement strategies, he creates impactful initiatives that strengthen brand value and accelerate business performance.



Lukas Blazkowski

Director - Business Development

Specialising in global mobility and cross-border planning, Lukas Błazkowski helps clients identify opportunities that support their personal, business, and international objectives.

Having lived and worked in Dubai for more than 11 years, he brings extensive regional knowledge and an international network spanning Europe, Asia, Africa, and the Americas. His expertise includes residency and citizenship solutions, international business structuring, and UAE-based investment opportunities. 



Aisha Khan

Legal Associate

Aisha Khan advises individual and corporate clients on a range of legal and regulatory matters, helping them navigate complex issues through clear, practical, and effective solutions.

Educated in London and based in Dubai, she combines an international legal perspective with a strong understanding of the UAE business landscape. Her approach is centred on building trust, simplifying complexity, and delivering meaningful value to every client engagement.



Dr. Maryam Amini

Senior Immigration Advisor

Dr. Maryam brings a rare combination of academic rigour and frontline advisory experience to the field of international mobility. A holder of a Doctorate of Business Administration and a native Farsi speaker, she has built deep expertise in residency and citizenship planning across multiple jurisdictions, with a particular focus on the Middle Eastern market and its distinct client needs.

Known for her thoughtful and personalised approach, Dr. Maryam takes time to understand each client’s circumstances, priorities, and long-term objectives before identifying the most appropriate pathway. Her clients benefit from advice that is both technically sound and genuinely tailored to their individual situation.



Igor Pribytkov

Senior Legal Associate - Corporate

Igor Pribytkov is a qualified lawyer and corporate legal advisor specialising in company formation, business structuring, and regulatory compliance across multiple jurisdictions. With a background in law and international business, he advises entrepreneurs, investors, and internationally active families on the full spectrum of corporate legal matters – from business setup and banking to real estate acquisition and cross-border compliance.

His approach is practical and solutions-focused. Igor cuts through complexity to help clients establish, structure, and manage their affairs efficiently, ensuring that legal and commercial frameworks support rather than obstruct their broader business and mobility objectives.



Fatih Buyukhan

Attorney at Law

A Turkish-qualified attorney with experience across both Istanbul and Dubai, Fatih Büyükhan advises clients on residency and citizenship planning, international real estate investment, and cross-border legal matters. His dual-jurisdiction background gives him a genuine edge when advising Turkish nationals exploring international opportunities and international clients looking to engage with Turkey’s legal and investment landscape.

Fatih is a recognised specialist in Turkish Citizenship by Investment, guiding clients through the full process with clarity and precision. His practice combines legal expertise with a commercially aware, client-first mindset, ensuring that every engagement is handled with both technical accuracy and personal attention.



Legal Services

At Knightsbridge Group, our experienced legal team is dedicated to providing comprehensive legal solutions tailored to meet your unique needs. With decades of combined experience, our lawyers possess the deep knowledge and expertise necessary to guide you through complex legal landscapes, ensuring the best outcomes for you, your business, and your family.

We offer a wide range of legal services designed to protect your wealth, safeguard your assets, and support your growth. From corporate structuring and corporate banking to legacy planning and beyond, our team is equipped to handle all aspects of your legal needs. Whether you’re looking to establish a strong foundation for your business, secure your family’s future, or navigate legal challenges, we’re here to provide the strategic guidance and support you need.

Book Now

Expert Legal Solutions for Protecting Your Wealth and Securing Your Future.

Legal Services

Corporate Structuring

Corporate Structuring is the process of organizing a company in a way that maximizes efficiency and minimizes risk.

Corporate Banking

Our team is experienced in establishing international bank accounts for clients, while also effectively managing their corporate affairs.

Legacy Planning

Legacy planning is the process of preparing for the distribution of property and assets to loved ones after one’s demise.

Tax & Accounting

Knightsbridge has decades of professional financial services experience and offers a full spectrum of business accounting services.

Our commitment is to deliver solutions that not only protect your interests but also empower you to achieve your financial goals with confidence. Trust our seasoned professionals to be your partners in navigating the legal complexities of today’s world, ensuring that your assets are well-protected and your legacy is preserved for generations to come.

Contact Our Legal Experts Now
